series_metadata.series_description: This series contains records related to exam and assessment development, preparation, and results for OSHP and OIU sworn employees. Records include candidate readiness interviews, commander evaluations, completed work exercises, test scores and evaluations, assessor recommendations for follow-up action, credit requests, CEC final reports, and supporting documentation, e.g. sign-in sheets, non-disclosure agreements, and correspondence.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: seven years following date of evaluation/ assessment in OSHP Office of Personnel Assessment Center files. These records may be digitized or transferred DPS Record Center during retention. ; Electronic: seven (7) years following date of evaluation / assessment in OSHP Office of Personnel Assessment Center files
